title: WINMAU Darts Blade 6 Professional Bristle Dartboard with Official tournament specifications | Endorsed by the PDC
features: SIXTH GENERATION DARTBOARD TECHNOLOGY: Superior Playability engineered with cutting-edge design for ultimate performance, ensuring a smooth and precise gameplay experience for professionals and enthusiasts alike. Patent Pending
DENSITY CONTROL WIRE: Maximum Scoring Potential, Optimized fibre density in doubles, trebles, and bullseye zones enhances dart retention and accuracy, delivering fewer bounce-outs and higher scores
ULTRA-THIN 60° WIRING: For reduced Bounce-Outs the angled wiring system deflects darts into scoring areas, minimizing deflections for a more rewarding and consistent game
PREMIUM EAST AFRICAN SISAL: Unmatched Durability crafted from the finest sisal, the Blade 6 withstands the toughest play environments, maintaining high performance over time
ROTA-LOCK MOUNTING SYSTEM: Easy Installation which fits securely on any wall with adjustable locking, allowing for fast setup so you can start playing within minutes

specifications_table.Included Components: Dartboard, Rota Lock mounting system, Game Manual
